products.title: FarmDirect
products.description: Map-based platform connecting farmers directly to common consumers. Real-time farm locations, currently available produce, and fair pricing. AI predicts harvest timing for unavailable items and matches local demand to nearby farmers — fresher goods, lower prices, higher farmer profits.
products.subject_line: Fresh local produce, straight from the farm.
products.why_works: Removes costly middlemen. Connects consumers directly to the source. Transparent value + instant connection = massive adoption and strong revenue.

products.title: NoShowGuard
products.description: Auto-reminds patients via SMS, Viber, WhatsApp. Patients confirm, cancel, or reschedule with one tap. AI predicts likely no-shows from history, time of day, and weather, sending extra nudges. Auto-fills cancelled slots from waitlist — direct, measurable revenue recovery within the first month.
before_bullets: Manual calls take significant staff time
products.why_works: No more unconfirmed slots. We know exactly which patients are likely to no-show and automatically fill their spot.

products.title: QueueSmart
products.description: QR-code digital queue replaces crowded waiting rooms. Patients scan on arrival, get a number, receive notifications when 2-3 patients away. AI estimates real-time wait times based on the doctor's actual pace. Lowers infection risk, reduces overcrowding, improves patient satisfaction.
products.subject_line: Upgrade your waiting room to Smart Queue.
before_bullets: Patients tied to the waiting area
after_bullets: Wait from anywhere: car, café, home
products.why_works: No more chaotic waiting. We show exactly how smart, real-time wait forecasting transforms the patient experience.
